paper.title_en: Apparent Planckian scattering from local polaron formation
paper.abstract_en: We propose a simple mechanism for apparent Planckian scattering based on local polaron formation, in which $Γ_\text{tr} = Γ_0 + αk_BT / \hbar$ with $α\sim O(1)$ emerges from quasielastic scattering without fine tuning. We provide evidence for our proposal in Monte Carlo simulations of the Holstein model with disordered electron-phonon coupling in the adiabatic limit. Our mechanism generates a finite interval of couplings in which the slope $α$ is approximately constant, coinciding with the onset of local polaron formation. In this regime, Matthiessen's rule is dramatically violated (or obeyed, depending on one's point of view) in that changes to the couplings, which in perturbation theory would alter the slope $α$, instead change the intercept $Γ_0$. We conjecture that a version of our mechanism applies to any system with a dominant disordered interaction that can drive polaron formation. This potentially includes regimes of several recently introduced strange metal models based on spatially random interactions.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文提出局域极化子形成导致表观普朗克散射机制，涉及强关联电子系统和奇怪金属，与全息凝聚态物理主题相关。
decision.title_zh: 局域极化子形成中的表观普朗克散射
decision.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于局域极化子形成的表观普朗克散射的简单机制，其中 Γ_tr = Γ_0 + αk_BT / ℏ 且 α~O(1) 来自准弹性散射，无需精细调节。我们在绝热极限下具有无序电子-声子耦合的 Holstein 模型的蒙特卡罗模拟中为我们的提议提供了证据。我们的机制产生了一个有限的耦合区间，在该区间内斜率 α 近似恒定，与局域极化子形成的起始点一致。在这个区域中，马西森定则被严重违反（或遵循，取决于观点），即改变耦合——这在微扰理论中会改变斜率 α——反而改变了截距 Γ_0。我们推测我们的机制的一个版本适用于任何具有主导无序相互作用且能驱动极化子形成的系统。这可能包括几种最近引入的基于空间随机相互作用的奇怪金属模型的区域。
